services.name: App Service
services.description: Hosts the enterprise RAG web application and API endpoints

services.name: Azure AI Foundry
services.description: Orchestrates prompt flows, retrieval, grounding, and response assembly

services.name: Azure Cognitive Search
services.description: Performs hybrid vector and keyword retrieval across indexed enterprise content

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.description: Runs GPT-5 to generate grounded responses from retrieved context

services.name: Azure Cache for Redis
services.description: Stores semantic cache entries for repeated or similar user queries

services.name: Storage Account
services.description: Holds source documents used to build the searchable RAG knowledge base

services.name: Microsoft Entra ID
services.description: Authenticates enterprise users and issues tokens to the application

services.name: Azure Monitor
services.description: Collects application telemetry and dependency metrics from the primary app tier

services.name: Log Analytics
services.description: Stores and analyzes centralized operational logs and telemetry

connections.label: Issue OAuth tokens for employee sign-in and session authorization
Check semantic cache for similar previously answered prompts
Return cached grounded answer when similarity threshold is satisfied
Submit uncached chat request for orchestration and grounding
Execute hybrid vector and keyword retrieval against enterprise index
Return ranked passages, metadata, and nearest-neighbor matches
Send grounded prompt with retrieved context to GPT-5 for answer generation
Return generated answer, citations, and model completion output
Store semantic cache entry for prompt fingerprint and final response
Provide source documents for indexing, chunking, and vector enrichment
Emit request latency, dependency calls, and user interaction telemetry
Persist aggregated application and platform diagnostics for analysis

workflow.description: Enterprise content is stored and supplied to the search service to build the hybrid retrieval index.
A user signs in to the RAG application using enterprise identity and receives an authenticated session.
The application checks the semantic cache to determine whether a similar question already has a reusable grounded answer.
If no cache hit is found, the application submits the user query to Azure AI Foundry for orchestration.
Azure AI Foundry retrieves relevant passages using hybrid vector and keyword search over indexed enterprise knowledge.
Azure AI Foundry sends the grounded prompt and retrieved context to GPT-5 to generate a response with citations.
The orchestrated response is cached for semantic reuse and returned to the authenticated application user.
The application emits telemetry to centralized monitoring where logs and metrics are retained for operations analysis.

metadata.prompt: An enterprise RAG application with Azure AI Foundry for orchestration, Azure AI Search with hybrid vector and keyword retrieval, Azure OpenAI GPT-5 for generation, Azure Cache for Redis for semantic caching, and App Service with Entra ID authentication
